notes: Floor set after CP-A redo Step 4 merged to main (commit 600c16c3). Captures the residual EN-on-RU tokens across the 10 locale-purity routes: /dashboard 62 + /work 69 + /work/time 395 + /clients 65 + /finances 18 + /analytics 274 + /analytics/forecast 66 + /contracts 19 + /settings 1491 + /settings/public-profile 58 = 2517.
